body:
Bot should not provide any code example without compiling and running it. For that it should use http://github.com/link-foundation/start to spawn docker images, that will execute the program.

If it timeouts in 1 minute, the bot should try to reduce number of iterations in half and so on.

And when replying to the user, give him feedback on N iterations or more variables, that do lead to timeout of 1 minute, and from which number timeout stopped.

So bot should actually help developer iterate on performance, if it does not fit in 1 minute interval.

It should be possible to ask bot to run a piece of code using natural language and code block.

And also describe any algorithm with natural language (or pseudo code), and get the result (both the code (in a telegram code block in selected language), that did compile, and also output (if it fits to telegram message) or output can be attached as .txt file if too long.

So if code does not compile, and reasoning of the bot takes more than 10 minutes - the task should totally fail, and verbose log of all reasoning steps and actions taken should be recorded, so it will be possible to iterate on bot's improvements.

So intelligence may be not smart enough at the moment, but all the interface though telegram bot should be all in place. Yet, some 10-20 examples of conversations that you think are typical should be supported in all interfaces (web - should only support just regular javascript eval at the moment). We can also try to add experimental access to alpine WebVM `https://webvm.io` to simulate small linux at browser, it may be in place it will be fine for now if it does not work.

Anyway library, CLI, web interface, telegram interface, all should be aware of their environment and limitations. So for example if user asks to execute language that is not supported in the environment that is not supported this of that execution feature, bot should provide refusal to execute what he knows he will not be able to execute in the current environment, and also if code generated by bot was not been executed (because environment does not allow it, bot should warn that this code was not tested, not compiled, not checked by him).

Telegram bot should support talking 1 by 1 in private messages, and also in public chats with everyone.

Also make sure to update our requirements document, so everything will be recorded for future vision.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Make a simple Telegram bot to use this
